official_functions.role: Construct the official Login serverbound custom_query_answer null-payload fixture
Write the official Login serverbound custom_query_answer body
Write the full Login serverbound framed custom_query_answer packet
Dispatch and decode the full Login serverbound framed custom_query_answer packet
Name the packet id assigned in Login serverbound state
Identify official transaction id and nullable payload marker body shape

invariants: The official Login serverbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the custom_query_answer body.
The official Login serverbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ServerboundCustomQueryAnswerPacket.
The decoded official ServerboundCustomQueryAnswerPacket preserves the transaction id from the fixture.
The official null-payload fixture writes the nullable payload marker in the body and decodes to the official discarded query answer payload object.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded packet type, decoded fields, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove plugin channel handling, custom payload semantics, login acknowledgement, Configuration entry, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer plugin channel handling, custom payload semantics, login acknowledgement, Configuration entry, or client-load completion.
